sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10151" key="a)ntimetabatiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιμετα-βᾰτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n10151.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">resilient,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
